name: python-best-practices
description: Reusable workflows for structuring, testing, and handling failures in production-quality Python projects.

interface.shortDescription: Structure, test, and harden production Python projects.
interface.longDescription: Reusable workflows for structuring, testing, and handling failures in production-quality Python projects.
defaultPrompt: Use $python-project-layout to review this repository and recommend a maintainable Python layout.
Use $python-testing-strategy to design a risk-based test strategy for this Python project.
Use $python-error-handling to review this exception design and propose a safe failure contract.
